abilities.name: Waaagh!
abilities.description:
Once per battle, until your next Command phase:
  -> The unit gains the Advance & Charge ability.
  -> Add 1 to the unit's Strength characteristic (melee).
  -> Add 1 to the unit's Attacks characteristic (melee).
  -> The unit has a 5+ invulnerable save.

abilities.description:

abilities.name: 'Ard Case
abilities.description:
Add 2 to this model's Toughness characteristic.
This model gains an ability.

abilities.name: Deadly Demise D6
abilities.description:
Before this model is removed from play:
  -> Roll one D6: on a 6+, each enemy unit within 6" suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Firing Deck 11
abilities.description: The unit gains the Firing Deck ability (11).

abilities.name: Ramshackle but Rugged
abilities.description: Subtract 1 from the attacking unit's Armour Penetration characteristic.

abilities.name: TRANSPORT
abilities.description: This model has a transport capacity of 22 ORKS INFANTRY models. Each MEGA ARMOUR model takes up the space of 2 models. Each JUMP PACK model takes up the space of 2 models.
